abbreviations.definition: invisible decrease (like sc2tog, but only in the front loops) Invisible Decrease Tutorial

materials: 1 (1, 1, 2, 2) skeins of yarn from the Knitted Knocker approved yarn list.
Size G (4.5mm) crochet hook (or size needed to get gauge)
3 locking stitch markers (1 in a different color for start of round)

rounds.rawInstruction: Create a magic ring with 6 sc in the ring. Close the ring.
rounds.summary: Create a magic ring and work 6 single crochets into it.
rounds.title: Rnd 1

rounds.rawInstruction: inc x 6 (12 sc)
rounds.summary: Increase in each stitch around.
rounds.title: Rnd 2

rounds.rawInstruction: (2 sc, 2 inc, PM X 3 (18 sc)
rounds.summary: Work 2 sc, 2 inc, place marker, repeat three times.
rounds.title: Rnd 3

rounds.rawInstruction: (4 sc, 2 inc) x 3 (24 sc).Move Markers up as you go.
rounds.summary: Work 4 sc, 2 inc, repeat three times.
rounds.title: Rnd 4

rounds.rawInstruction: (7 sc, inc) x 3 (27 sc)
rounds.summary: Work 7 sc, inc, repeat three times.
rounds.title: Rnd 5

rounds.rawInstruction: (Work to 1 sc before marker and inc x 2) x 3 (33 sc)
rounds.summary: Work to 1 sc before marker, increase twice, repeat three times.
rounds.title: Rnd 6

rounds.rawInstruction: (Work to marker and inc in marked stitch) x 3 (36 sc)
rounds.summary: Work to marker, increase in the marked stitch, repeat three times.
rounds.title: Rnd 7

rounds.rawInstruction: Using the tapestry needle, sew in the magic ring’s 6” tail.
rounds.summary: Weave in the magic ring tail.
rounds.title: Sew in magic ring tail

rounds.rawInstruction: Repeat Rnds 6 & 7 three times until 4.5” across or 13 rounds (approx. 63 sc)
rounds.summary: Cycle through rounds 6 and 7 until reaching 13 total rounds for size A.
rounds.title: A cup – Repeat Rnds 6 & 7

rounds.rawInstruction: Repeat Rnds 6 & 7 four times until 5” across or 15 rounds (approx.72 sc)
rounds.summary: Cycle through rounds 6 and 7 until reaching 15 total rounds for size B.
rounds.title: B cup – Repeat Rnds 6 & 7

rounds.rawInstruction: Repeat Rnds 6 & 7 five times until 5.5” across or 17 rounds (approx. 81 sc)
rounds.summary: Cycle through rounds 6 and 7 until reaching 17 total rounds for size C.
rounds.title: C cup – Repeat Rnds 6 & 7

rounds.rawInstruction: Repeat Rnds 6 & 7 six times until 6” across or 19 rounds (approx 90 sc)
rounds.summary: Cycle through rounds 6 and 7 until reaching 19 total rounds for size D.
rounds.title: D cup – Repeat Rnds 6 & 7

rounds.rawInstruction: Repeat Rnds 6 & 7 seven times until 6.5” across or 21 rounds (approx. 99 sc)
rounds.summary: Cycle through rounds 6 and 7 until reaching 21 total rounds for size DD.
rounds.title: DD cup – Repeat Rnds 6 & 7

rounds.rawInstruction: Work 2 rnds even through the back loop only.
rounds.summary: Work two rounds of single crochet in the back loop only, without increasing.
rounds.title: Work 2 rnds even through back loop only

rounds.rawInstruction: When the size is correct, the turning rows have been completed, and you’re ready to start decreasing, crochet until 1 sc before the first marker.
rounds.summary: Work single crochet until 1 stitch before the first marker.
rounds.title: Crochet until 1 sc before first marker

rounds.rawInstruction: (inv dec (PM), inv dec, then sc until 1 sc before the next marker) x 3.
rounds.summary: Work invisible decrease, place marker, another invisible decrease, then single crochet to 1 stitch before the next marker; repeat three times.
rounds.title: Rnd 1

rounds.rawInstruction: Repeat Rnd 1 until you have 15 sc left.
rounds.summary: Repeat the previous round's decrease sequence until only 15 stitches remain.
rounds.title: Repeat Rnd 1 until 15 sc left

rounds.rawInstruction: Cut yarn leaving a 10” tail.
rounds.summary: Cut the yarn, leaving a long tail.
rounds.title: Cut yarn leaving 10” tail

rounds.rawInstruction: Thread tapestry needle and weave through the front loop only for the remaining 15 sc.
rounds.summary: Weave the yarn tail through the front loops of the remaining stitches.
rounds.title: Weave through front loops of remaining 15 sc

rounds.rawInstruction: Slightly overstuff with Poly-fil (or other fiber fill) Do not close hole as it is difficult to reopen.
rounds.summary: Add stuffing to the Knocker.
rounds.title: Add stuffing

rounds.rawInstruction: Tuck tail into Knocker so that filling can be adjusted as needed.
rounds.summary: Tuck the yarn tail inside.
rounds.title: Tuck tail inside
